principle: Three agents that operate on the SKILL SYSTEM itself, not on domain problems.

agents.role: Hold competing hypotheses structurally until evidence forces collapse
agents.contrast: ≠ verify-gate (that VERIFIES claims; this HOLDS competing claims alive)
agents.action: prevent premature collapse, route to more evidence, escalate to sovereign if stuck

agents.role: Detect strategy collapse, surface prune/evolve candidates
agents.invariant: Audit surface (every skill invocation logged) + Resource budget (CPU/time/entropy caps)
agents.contrast: ≠ meta-evals (that BENCHMARKS skills; this MONITORS live skill behavior)
agents.action: flag skill for prune/evolve, surface to meta-skill-evolver, log to audit

agents.role: Verify provenance chain integrity for all sealed claims
agents.invariant: Lineage token (hash + signer) + Immutable receipt chain
agents.contrast: ≠ audit-seal (that CREATES seals; this VERIFIES seal chain integrity)
agents.action: verify hash chain, flag breaks, surface to sovereign if chain compromised
agents.anti_pattern: chain gaps tolerated (zero tolerance: any break = HOLD)
